```{r build_event_cluster_composition_tables}
    DriftID_clean,
    DriftName,
    Latitude,
    Longitude
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    n_clicks_total = n(),
    n_clicks_unassigned = sum(HDBSCAN_cluster == "0"),
    n_clicks_assigned = sum(HDBSCAN_cluster != "0"),
    percent_unassigned = 100 * n_clicks_unassigned / n_clicks_total,
    percent_assigned = 100 * n_clicks_assigned / n_clicks_total,
    n_clusters_present_with_noise = n_distinct(HDBSCAN_cluster),
    n_clusters_present_no_noise = n_distinct(HDBSCAN_cluster[HDBSCAN_cluster != "0"]),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(DriftID_clean, EventID_clean)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save tables
# ------------------------------------------------------------

write.csv(
  event_cluster_counts_with_noise,
  file.path(
    event_map_table_dir,
    paste0("event_cluster_composition_WITH_noise_", mapping_result_name, ".csv")
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  event_cluster_counts_no_noise,
  file.path(
    event_map_table_dir,
    paste0("event_cluster_composition_NO_noise_", mapping_result_name, ".csv")
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  event_cluster_summary,
  file.path(
    event_map_table_dir,
    paste0("event_cluster_summary_", mapping_result_name, ".csv")
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("Event cluster composition WITH noise:\n")
print(head(event_cluster_counts_with_noise, 20))

cat("\nEvent cluster summary:\n")
print(event_cluster_summary, n = Inf)

cat("\nPASS: Event-level cluster composition tables created.\n")

```

## Event Pie Maps Without scatterpie

```{r event_pie_maps_no_scatterpie}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper: create pie slice polygons
# ------------------------------------------------------------

make_pie_polygons <- function(df, group_col, lon_col, lat_col, cluster_col, prop_col, radius = 0.18) {
  
  df <- df %>%
    arrange(.data[[group_col]], as.numeric(as.character(.data[[cluster_col]]))) %>%
    group_by(.data[[group_col]]) %>%
    mutate(
      ymin = lag(cumsum(.data[[prop_col]]), default = 0),
      ymax = cumsum(.data[[prop_col]])
    ) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  pie_list <- list()
  counter <- 1
  
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
    
    row <- df[i, ]
    
    angles <- seq(
      2 * pi * row$ymin,
      2 * pi * row$ymax,
      length.out = 40
    )
    
    polygon_df <- data.frame(
      x = c(
        row[[lon_col]],
        row[[lon_col]] + radius * cos(angles)
      ),
      y = c(
        row[[lat_col]],
        row[[lat_col]] + radius * sin(angles)
      ),
      HDBSCAN_cluster = as.character(row[[cluster_col]]),
      PieGroup = as.character(row[[group_col]]),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    pie_list[[counter]] <- polygon_df
    counter <- counter + 1
  }
  
  bind_rows(pie_list)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Consistent colors
# ------------------------------------------------------------

event_clusters_all <- sort(
  unique(as.character(mapping_hdbscan_with_locations$HDBSCAN_cluster))
)

cluster_colors_current <- make_cluster_colors(event_clusters_all)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# World basemap
# ------------------------------------------------------------

world <- rnaturalearth::ne_countries(
  scale = "medium",
  returnclass = "sf"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Event pie polygons WITH noise
# ------------------------------------------------------------

event_pie_polygons_with_noise <- make_pie_polygons(
  df = event_cluster_counts_with_noise,
  group_col = "EventID_clean",
  lon_col = "Longitude",
  lat_col = "Latitude",
  cluster_col = "HDBSCAN_cluster",
  prop_col = "proportion",
  radius = 0.18
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Event pie map WITH noise
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_event_pies_with_noise <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(
    data = world,
    fill = "grey95",
    color = "grey70",
    linewidth = 0.2
  ) +
  geom_polygon(
    data = event_pie_polygons_with_noise,
    aes(
      x = x,
      y = y,
      group = interaction(PieGroup, HDBSCAN_cluster),
      fill = HDBSCAN_cluster
    ),
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.15,
    alpha = 0.95
  ) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(
      min(mapping_hdbscan_with_locations$Longitude) - 2,
      max(mapping_hdbscan_with_locations$Longitude) + 2
    ),
    ylim = c(
      min(mapping_hdbscan_with_locations$Latitude) - 2,
      max(mapping_hdbscan_with_locations$Latitude) + 2
    )
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = cluster_colors_current,
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Event-Level HDBSCAN Cluster Composition",
    subtitle = paste0(
      mapping_analysis_name,
      "; minPts = ",
      mapping_minPts,
      "; including unassigned cluster 0"
    ),
    fill = "HDBSCAN cluster"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_event_pies_with_noise)

ggsave(
  file.path(
    event_map_plot_dir,
    paste0("event_pie_map_WITH_noise_", mapping_result_name, ".png")
  ),
  p_event_pies_with_noise,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Event pie polygons WITHOUT noise
# ------------------------------------------------------------

event_pie_polygons_no_noise <- make_pie_polygons(
  df = event_cluster_counts_no_noise,
  group_col = "EventID_clean",
  lon_col = "Longitude",
  lat_col = "Latitude",
  cluster_col = "HDBSCAN_cluster",
  prop_col = "proportion",
  radius = 0.18
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Event pie map WITHOUT noise
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_event_pies_no_noise <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(
    data = world,
    fill = "grey95",
    color = "grey70",
    linewidth = 0.2
  ) +
  geom_polygon(
    data = event_pie_polygons_no_noise,
    aes(
      x = x,
      y = y,
      group = interaction(PieGroup, HDBSCAN_cluster),
      fill = HDBSCAN_cluster
    ),
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.15,
    alpha = 0.95
  ) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(
      min(mapping_hdbscan_with_locations$Longitude) - 2,
      max(mapping_hdbscan_with_locations$Longitude) + 2
    ),
    ylim = c(
      min(mapping_hdbscan_with_locations$Latitude) - 2,
      max(mapping_hdbscan_with_locations$Latitude) + 2
    )
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = cluster_colors_current,
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Event-Level HDBSCAN Cluster Composition",
    subtitle = paste0(
      mapping_analysis_name,
      "; minPts = ",
      mapping_minPts,
      "; unassigned cluster removed"
    ),
    fill = "HDBSCAN cluster"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_event_pies_no_noise)

ggsave(
  file.path(
    event_map_plot_dir,
    paste0("event_pie_map_NO_noise_", mapping_result_name, ".png")
  ),
  p_event_pies_no_noise,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

cat("\nPASS: Event pie maps generated without scatterpie.\n")

```

## Event Pie Maps Without scatterpie — Bigger Pies

```{r event_pie_maps_no_scatterpie_bigger}

event_pie_radius <- 0.45

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper: create pie slice polygons
# ------------------------------------------------------------

make_pie_polygons <- function(df, group_col, lon_col, lat_col, cluster_col, prop_col, radius = 0.45) {
  
  df <- df %>%
    arrange(.data[[group_col]], as.numeric(as.character(.data[[cluster_col]]))) %>%
    group_by(.data[[group_col]]) %>%
    mutate(
      ymin = lag(cumsum(.data[[prop_col]]), default = 0),
      ymax = cumsum(.data[[prop_col]])
    ) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  pie_list <- list()
  counter <- 1
  
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
    
    row <- df[i, ]
    
    angles <- seq(
      2 * pi * row$ymin,
      2 * pi * row$ymax,
      length.out = 60
    )
    
    polygon_df <- data.frame(
      x = c(row[[lon_col]], row[[lon_col]] + radius * cos(angles)),
      y = c(row[[lat_col]], row[[lat_col]] + radius * sin(angles)),
      HDBSCAN_cluster = as.character(row[[cluster_col]]),
      PieGroup = as.character(row[[group_col]]),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    pie_list[[counter]] <- polygon_df
    counter <- counter + 1
  }
  
  bind_rows(pie_list)
}

event_pie_polygons_with_noise <- make_pie_polygons(
  df = event_cluster_counts_with_noise,
  group_col = "EventID_clean",
  lon_col = "Longitude",
  lat_col = "Latitude",
  cluster_col = "HDBSCAN_cluster",
  prop_col = "proportion",
  radius = event_pie_radius
)

event_pie_polygons_no_noise <- make_pie_polygons(
  df = event_cluster_counts_no_noise,
  group_col = "EventID_clean",
  lon_col = "Longitude",
  lat_col = "Latitude",
  cluster_col = "HDBSCAN_cluster",
  prop_col = "proportion",
  radius = event_pie_radius
)

p_event_pies_with_noise <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = world, fill = "grey95", color = "grey70", linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_polygon(
    data = event_pie_polygons_with_noise,
    aes(x = x, y = y, group = interaction(PieGroup, HDBSCAN_cluster), fill = HDBSCAN_cluster),
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.15,
    alpha = 0.95
  ) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(min(mapping_hdbscan_with_locations$Longitude) - 2, max(mapping_hdbscan_with_locations$Longitude) + 2),
    ylim = c(min(mapping_hdbscan_with_locations$Latitude) - 2, max(mapping_hdbscan_with_locations$Latitude) + 2)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cluster_colors_current, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "Event-Level HDBSCAN Cluster Composition",
    subtitle = paste0(mapping_analysis_name, "; minPts = ", mapping_minPts, "; including unassigned cluster 0"),
    fill = "HDBSCAN cluster"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_event_pies_with_noise)

ggsave(
  file.path(event_map_plot_dir, paste0("event_pie_map_WITH_noise_BIGGER_", mapping_result_name, ".png")),
  p_event_pies_with_noise,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

p_event_pies_no_noise <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = world, fill = "grey95", color = "grey70", linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_polygon(
    data = event_pie_polygons_no_noise,
    aes(x = x, y = y, group = interaction(PieGroup, HDBSCAN_cluster), fill = HDBSCAN_cluster),
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.15,
    alpha = 0.95
  ) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(min(mapping_hdbscan_with_locations$Longitude) - 2, max(mapping_hdbscan_with_locations$Longitude) + 2),
    ylim = c(min(mapping_hdbscan_with_locations$Latitude) - 2, max(mapping_hdbscan_with_locations$Latitude) + 2)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cluster_colors_current, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "Event-Level HDBSCAN Cluster Composition",
    subtitle = paste0(mapping_analysis_name, "; minPts = ", mapping_minPts, "; unassigned cluster removed"),
    fill = "HDBSCAN cluster"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_event_pies_no_noise)

ggsave(
  file.path(event_map_plot_dir, paste0("event_pie_map_NO_noise_BIGGER_", mapping_result_name, ".png")),
  p_event_pies_no_noise,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

cat("\nPASS: Bigger event pie maps generated.\n")

```

## Drift-Level Big Pie Maps

```{r drift_level_big_pie_maps}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Big drift pie radius
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_pie_radius <- 0.75

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Drift-level cluster counts WITH noise
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_cluster_counts_with_noise <- mapping_hdbscan_with_locations %>%
  count(
    DriftID_clean,
    DriftName,
    HDBSCAN_cluster,
    name = "n_clicks"
  ) %>%
  group_by(DriftID_clean) %>%
  mutate(
    total_clicks_drift = sum(n_clicks),
    proportion = n_clicks / total_clicks_drift,
    percent = 100 * proportion
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(DriftID_clean, as.numeric(as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster)))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Drift-level cluster counts WITHOUT noise
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_cluster_counts_no_noise <- mapping_hdbscan_with_locations %>%
  filter(HDBSCAN_cluster != "0") %>%
  count(
    DriftID_clean,
    DriftName,
    HDBSCAN_cluster,
    name = "n_clicks"
  ) %>%
  group_by(DriftID_clean) %>%
  mutate(
    total_clicks_drift_nonnoise = sum(n_clicks),
    proportion = n_clicks / total_clicks_drift_nonnoise,
    percent = 100 * proportion
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(DriftID_clean, as.numeric(as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster)))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Drift-level locations
# Mean of event locations within each drift
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_locations <- mapping_hdbscan_with_locations %>%
  distinct(
    DriftID_clean,
    DriftName,
    EventID_clean,
    Latitude,
    Longitude
  ) %>%
  group_by(DriftID_clean, DriftName) %>%
  summarise(
    Latitude = mean(Latitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    Longitude = mean(Longitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_events_in_drift = n_distinct(EventID_clean),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Join drift locations to drift cluster tables
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_cluster_counts_with_noise <- drift_cluster_counts_with_noise %>%
  left_join(
    drift_locations,
    by = c("DriftID_clean", "DriftName")
  )

drift_cluster_counts_no_noise <- drift_cluster_counts_no_noise %>%
  left_join(
    drift_locations,
    by = c("DriftID_clean", "DriftName")
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save drift composition tables
# ------------------------------------------------------------

write.csv(
  drift_cluster_counts_with_noise,
  file.path(
    drift_map_table_dir,
    paste0("drift_cluster_composition_WITH_noise_", mapping_result_name, ".csv")
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  drift_cluster_counts_no_noise,
  file.path(
    drift_map_table_dir,
    paste0("drift_cluster_composition_NO_noise_", mapping_result_name, ".csv")
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  drift_locations,
  file.path(
    drift_map_table_dir,
    paste0("drift_mean_locations_", mapping_result_name, ".csv")
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Consistent colors
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_clusters_all <- sort(
  unique(as.character(mapping_hdbscan_with_locations$HDBSCAN_cluster))
)

cluster_colors_current <- make_cluster_colors(drift_clusters_all)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Drift pie polygons WITH noise
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_pie_polygons_with_noise <- make_pie_polygons(
  df = drift_cluster_counts_with_noise,
  group_col = "DriftID_clean",
  lon_col = "Longitude",
  lat_col = "Latitude",
  cluster_col = "HDBSCAN_cluster",
  prop_col = "proportion",
  radius = drift_pie_radius
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Drift pie map WITH noise
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_drift_pies_with_noise <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(
    data = world,
    fill = "grey95",
    color = "grey70",
    linewidth = 0.2
  ) +
  geom_polygon(
    data = drift_pie_polygons_with_noise,
    aes(
      x = x,
      y = y,
      group = interaction(PieGroup, HDBSCAN_cluster),
      fill = HDBSCAN_cluster
    ),
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.18,
    alpha = 0.95
  ) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(
      min(drift_locations$Longitude) - 2,
      max(drift_locations$Longitude) + 2
    ),
    ylim = c(
      min(drift_locations$Latitude) - 2,
      max(drift_locations$Latitude) + 2
    )
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = cluster_colors_current,
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Drift-Level HDBSCAN Cluster Composition",
    subtitle = paste0(
      mapping_analysis_name,
      "; minPts = ",
      mapping_minPts,
      "; including unassigned cluster 0"
    ),
    fill = "HDBSCAN cluster"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_drift_pies_with_noise)

ggsave(
  file.path(
    drift_map_plot_dir,
    paste0("drift_pie_map_WITH_noise_BIG_", mapping_result_name, ".png")
  ),
  p_drift_pies_with_noise,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Drift pie polygons WITHOUT noise
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_pie_polygons_no_noise <- make_pie_polygons(
  df = drift_cluster_counts_no_noise,
  group_col = "DriftID_clean",
  lon_col = "Longitude",
  lat_col = "Latitude",
  cluster_col = "HDBSCAN_cluster",
  prop_col = "proportion",
  radius = drift_pie_radius
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Drift pie map WITHOUT noise
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_drift_pies_no_noise <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(
    data = world,
    fill = "grey95",
    color = "grey70",
    linewidth = 0.2
  ) +
  geom_polygon(
    data = drift_pie_polygons_no_noise,
    aes(
      x = x,
      y = y,
      group = interaction(PieGroup, HDBSCAN_cluster),
      fill = HDBSCAN_cluster
    ),
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.18,
    alpha = 0.95
  ) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(
      min(drift_locations$Longitude) - 2,
      max(drift_locations$Longitude) + 2
    ),
    ylim = c(
      min(drift_locations$Latitude) - 2,
      max(drift_locations$Latitude) + 2
    )
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = cluster_colors_current,
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Drift-Level HDBSCAN Cluster Composition",
    subtitle = paste0(
      mapping_analysis_name,
      "; minPts = ",
      mapping_minPts,
      "; unassigned cluster removed"
    ),
    fill = "HDBSCAN cluster"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_drift_pies_no_noise)

ggsave(
  file.path(
    drift_map_plot_dir,
    paste0("drift_pie_map_NO_noise_BIG_", mapping_result_name, ".png")
  ),
  p_drift_pies_no_noise,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

cat("\nPASS: Big drift-level pie maps generated.\n")

```

## Drift-Level Pie Maps With Expanded Manual Coordinate Grouping

```{r drift_level_pie_maps_manual_coordinate_grouping_v2}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Pie size
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_pie_radius <- 0.45

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Create manual display coordinates
# ------------------------------------------------------------

manual_display_locations <- drift_locations %>%
  mutate(
    DisplayGroup = case_when(
      # Around 45N, 124W
      Latitude >= 44.5 & Latitude <= 46.0 &
        Longitude >= -125.5 & Longitude <= -123.0 ~ "Group_45N_124W",

      # Around 41N, 124W
      Latitude >= 40.3 & Latitude <= 41.5 &
        Longitude >= -125.2 & Longitude <= -123.8 ~ "Group_41N_124W",

      # Around 37–38N, 122–123W / Point Reyes-ish overlap
      Latitude >= 37.5 & Latitude <= 38.5 &
        Longitude >= -124.0 & Longitude <= -122.5 ~ "Group_38N_123W",

      # Around 36N, 122W / Monterey-ish overlap
      Latitude >= 35.0 & Latitude <= 36.8 &
        Longitude >= -122.5 & Longitude <= -121.0 ~ "Group_36N_122W",

      TRUE ~ DriftID_clean
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(DisplayGroup) %>%
  mutate(
    DisplayLatitude = mean(Latitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    DisplayLongitude = mean(Longitude, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

cat("Manual display coordinate groups:\n")
print(
  manual_display_locations %>%
    arrange(DisplayGroup, DriftID_clean),
  n = Inf
)

write.csv(
  manual_display_locations,
  file.path(
    drift_map_table_dir,
    paste0("manual_display_locations_grouped_v2_", mapping_result_name, ".csv")
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Join display coordinates onto drift cluster composition tables
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_cluster_counts_with_noise_display <- drift_cluster_counts_with_noise %>%
  select(-Latitude, -Longitude) %>%
  left_join(
    manual_display_locations %>%
      select(
        DriftID_clean,
        DisplayGroup,
        DisplayLatitude,
        DisplayLongitude
      ),
    by = "DriftID_clean"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Latitude = DisplayLatitude,
    Longitude = DisplayLongitude
  )

drift_cluster_counts_no_noise_display <- drift_cluster_counts_no_noise %>%
  select(-Latitude, -Longitude) %>%
  left_join(
    manual_display_locations %>%
      select(
        DriftID_clean,
        DisplayGroup,
        DisplayLatitude,
        DisplayLongitude
      ),
    by = "DriftID_clean"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Latitude = DisplayLatitude,
    Longitude = DisplayLongitude
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Collapse by DisplayGroup so nearby drifts become one pie
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_display_counts_with_noise <- drift_cluster_counts_with_noise_display %>%
  group_by(
    DisplayGroup,
    Latitude,
    Longitude,
    HDBSCAN_cluster
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    n_clicks = sum(n_clicks),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(DisplayGroup) %>%
  mutate(
    total_clicks_display_group = sum(n_clicks),
    proportion = n_clicks / total_clicks_display_group,
    percent = 100 * proportion
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

drift_display_counts_no_noise <- drift_cluster_counts_no_noise_display %>%
  group_by(
    DisplayGroup,
    Latitude,
    Longitude,
    HDBSCAN_cluster
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    n_clicks = sum(n_clicks),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(DisplayGroup) %>%
  mutate(
    total_clicks_display_group_nonnoise = sum(n_clicks),
    proportion = n_clicks / total_clicks_display_group_nonnoise,
    percent = 100 * proportion
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

write.csv(
  drift_display_counts_with_noise,
  file.path(
    drift_map_table_dir,
    paste0("drift_DISPLAY_GROUP_composition_WITH_noise_v2_", mapping_result_name, ".csv")
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  drift_display_counts_no_noise,
  file.path(
    drift_map_table_dir,
    paste0("drift_DISPLAY_GROUP_composition_NO_noise_v2_", mapping_result_name, ".csv")
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Build polygons WITH noise
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_display_pie_polygons_with_noise <- make_pie_polygons(
  df = drift_display_counts_with_noise,
  group_col = "DisplayGroup",
  lon_col = "Longitude",
  lat_col = "Latitude",
  cluster_col = "HDBSCAN_cluster",
  prop_col = "proportion",
  radius = drift_pie_radius
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Map WITH noise
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_drift_display_with_noise <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(
    data = world,
    fill = "grey95",
    color = "grey70",
    linewidth = 0.2
  ) +
  geom_polygon(
    data = drift_display_pie_polygons_with_noise,
    aes(
      x = x,
      y = y,
      group = interaction(PieGroup, HDBSCAN_cluster),
      fill = HDBSCAN_cluster
    ),
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.18,
    alpha = 0.95
  ) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(
      min(drift_display_counts_with_noise$Longitude) - 2,
      max(drift_display_counts_with_noise$Longitude) + 2
    ),
    ylim = c(
      min(drift_display_counts_with_noise$Latitude) - 2,
      max(drift_display_counts_with_noise$Latitude) + 2
    )
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = cluster_colors_current,
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Drift-Level HDBSCAN Cluster Composition",
    subtitle = paste0(
      mapping_analysis_name,
      "; minPts = ",
      mapping_minPts,
      "; nearby drift coordinates grouped; including unassigned cluster 0"
    ),
    x = "Longitude (°W)",
    y = "Latitude (°N)",
    fill = "HDBSCAN cluster"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_drift_display_with_noise)

ggsave(
  file.path(
    drift_map_plot_dir,
    paste0("drift_pie_map_WITH_noise_GROUPED_COORDS_radius0.45_v2_", mapping_result_name, ".png")
  ),
  p_drift_display_with_noise,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Build polygons WITHOUT noise
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_display_pie_polygons_no_noise <- make_pie_polygons(
  df = drift_display_counts_no_noise,
  group_col = "DisplayGroup",
  lon_col = "Longitude",
  lat_col = "Latitude",
  cluster_col = "HDBSCAN_cluster",
  prop_col = "proportion",
  radius = drift_pie_radius
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Map WITHOUT noise
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_drift_display_no_noise <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(
    data = world,
    fill = "grey95",
    color = "grey70",
    linewidth = 0.2
  ) +
  geom_polygon(
    data = drift_display_pie_polygons_no_noise,
    aes(
      x = x,
      y = y,
      group = interaction(PieGroup, HDBSCAN_cluster),
      fill = HDBSCAN_cluster
    ),
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.18,
    alpha = 0.95
  ) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(
      min(drift_display_counts_no_noise$Longitude) - 2,
      max(drift_display_counts_no_noise$Longitude) + 2
    ),
    ylim = c(
      min(drift_display_counts_no_noise$Latitude) - 2,
      max(drift_display_counts_no_noise$Latitude) + 2
    )
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = cluster_colors_current,
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Drift-Level HDBSCAN Cluster Composition",
    subtitle = paste0(
      mapping_analysis_name,
      "; minPts = ",
      mapping_minPts,
      "; nearby drift coordinates grouped; unassigned cluster removed"
    ),
    x = "Longitude (°W)",
    y = "Latitude (°N)",
    fill = "HDBSCAN cluster"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_drift_display_no_noise)

ggsave(
  file.path(
    drift_map_plot_dir,
    paste0("drift_pie_map_NO_noise_GROUPED_COORDS_radius0.45_v2_", mapping_result_name, ".png")
  ),
  p_drift_display_no_noise,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

cat("\nPASS: Grouped-coordinate drift pie maps v2 generated.\n")

```

## Drift-Level Pie Maps With Expanded Manual Coordinate Grouping v3

```{r drift_level_pie_maps_manual_coordinate_grouping_v3}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Pie size
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_pie_radius <- 0.75

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Create manual display coordinates
# ------------------------------------------------------------

manual_display_locations <- drift_locations %>%
  mutate(
    DisplayGroup = case_when(
      # Around 45N, 124W
      Latitude >= 44.5 & Latitude <= 46.0 &
        Longitude >= -125.5 & Longitude <= -123.0 ~ "Group_45N_124W",

      # Around 41N, 124W
      Latitude >= 40.3 & Latitude <= 41.5 &
        Longitude >= -125.2 & Longitude <= -123.8 ~ "Group_41N_124W",

      # Around 37–38N, 122–123W
      Latitude >= 37.5 & Latitude <= 38.5 &
        Longitude >= -124.0 & Longitude <= -122.5 ~ "Group_38N_123W",

      # Around 36N, 122W
      Latitude >= 35.0 & Latitude <= 36.8 &
        Longitude >= -122.5 & Longitude <= -121.0 ~ "Group_36N_122W",

      # Around 36N, 128W
      Latitude >= 35.5 & Latitude <= 37.0 &
        Longitude >= -129.0 & Longitude <= -127.0 ~ "Group_36N_128W",

      TRUE ~ DriftID_clean
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(DisplayGroup) %>%
  mutate(
    DisplayLatitude = mean(Latitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    DisplayLongitude = mean(Longitude, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

write.csv(
  manual_display_locations,
  file.path(
    drift_map_table_dir,
    paste0("manual_display_locations_grouped_v3_", mapping_result_name, ".csv")
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

print(manual_display_locations %>% arrange(DisplayGroup, DriftID_clean), n = Inf)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Join display coordinates
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_cluster_counts_with_noise_display <- drift_cluster_counts_with_noise %>%
  select(-Latitude, -Longitude) %>%
  left_join(
    manual_display_locations %>%
      select(DriftID_clean, DisplayGroup, DisplayLatitude, DisplayLongitude),
    by = "DriftID_clean"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Latitude = DisplayLatitude,
    Longitude = DisplayLongitude
  )

drift_cluster_counts_no_noise_display <- drift_cluster_counts_no_noise %>%
  select(-Latitude, -Longitude) %>%
  left_join(
    manual_display_locations %>%
      select(DriftID_clean, DisplayGroup, DisplayLatitude, DisplayLongitude),
    by = "DriftID_clean"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Latitude = DisplayLatitude,
    Longitude = DisplayLongitude
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Collapse by DisplayGroup
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_display_counts_with_noise <- drift_cluster_counts_with_noise_display %>%
  group_by(DisplayGroup, Latitude, Longitude, HDBSCAN_cluster) %>%
  summarise(n_clicks = sum(n_clicks), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(DisplayGroup) %>%
  mutate(
    total_clicks_display_group = sum(n_clicks),
    proportion = n_clicks / total_clicks_display_group,
    percent = 100 * proportion
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

drift_display_counts_no_noise <- drift_cluster_counts_no_noise_display %>%
  group_by(DisplayGroup, Latitude, Longitude, HDBSCAN_cluster) %>%
  summarise(n_clicks = sum(n_clicks), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(DisplayGroup) %>%
  mutate(
    total_clicks_display_group_nonnoise = sum(n_clicks),
    proportion = n_clicks / total_clicks_display_group_nonnoise,
    percent = 100 * proportion
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

write.csv(
  drift_display_counts_with_noise,
  file.path(
    drift_map_table_dir,
    paste0("drift_DISPLAY_GROUP_composition_WITH_noise_v3_", mapping_result_name, ".csv")
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  drift_display_counts_no_noise,
  file.path(
    drift_map_table_dir,
    paste0("drift_DISPLAY_GROUP_composition_NO_noise_v3_", mapping_result_name, ".csv")
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# WITH noise map
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_display_pie_polygons_with_noise <- make_pie_polygons(
  df = drift_display_counts_with_noise,
  group_col = "DisplayGroup",
  lon_col = "Longitude",
  lat_col = "Latitude",
  cluster_col = "HDBSCAN_cluster",
  prop_col = "proportion",
  radius = drift_pie_radius
)

p_drift_display_with_noise <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(
    data = world,
    fill = "grey95",
    color = "grey70",
    linewidth = 0.2
  ) +
  geom_polygon(
    data = drift_display_pie_polygons_with_noise,
    aes(
      x = x,
      y = y,
      group = interaction(PieGroup, HDBSCAN_cluster),
      fill = HDBSCAN_cluster
    ),
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.18,
    alpha = 0.95
  ) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(
      min(drift_display_counts_with_noise$Longitude) - 2,
      max(drift_display_counts_with_noise$Longitude) + 2
    ),
    ylim = c(
      min(drift_display_counts_with_noise$Latitude) - 2,
      max(drift_display_counts_with_noise$Latitude) + 2
    )
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cluster_colors_current, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "Drift-Level HDBSCAN Cluster Composition",
    subtitle = paste0(
      mapping_analysis_name,
      "; minPts = ",
      mapping_minPts,
      "; nearby drift coordinates grouped; including unassigned cluster 0"
    ),
    x = "Longitude (°W)",
    y = "Latitude (°N)",
    fill = "HDBSCAN cluster"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_drift_display_with_noise)

ggsave(
  file.path(
    drift_map_plot_dir,
    paste0("drift_pie_map_WITH_noise_GROUPED_COORDS_radius0.75_v3_", mapping_result_name, ".png")
  ),
  p_drift_display_with_noise,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# WITHOUT noise map
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_display_pie_polygons_no_noise <- make_pie_polygons(
  df = drift_display_counts_no_noise,
  group_col = "DisplayGroup",
  lon_col = "Longitude",
  lat_col = "Latitude",
  cluster_col = "HDBSCAN_cluster",
  prop_col = "proportion",
  radius = drift_pie_radius
)

p_drift_display_no_noise <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(
    data = world,
    fill = "grey95",
    color = "grey70",
    linewidth = 0.2
  ) +
  geom_polygon(
    data = drift_display_pie_polygons_no_noise,
    aes(
      x = x,
      y = y,
      group = interaction(PieGroup, HDBSCAN_cluster),
      fill = HDBSCAN_cluster
    ),
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.18,
    alpha = 0.95
  ) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(
      min(drift_display_counts_no_noise$Longitude) - 2,
      max(drift_display_counts_no_noise$Longitude) + 2
    ),
    ylim = c(
      min(drift_display_counts_no_noise$Latitude) - 2,
      max(drift_display_counts_no_noise$Latitude) + 2
    )
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cluster_colors_current, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "Drift-Level HDBSCAN Cluster Composition",
    subtitle = paste0(
      mapping_analysis_name,
      "; minPts = ",
      mapping_minPts,
      "; nearby drift coordinates grouped; unassigned cluster removed"
    ),
    x = "Longitude (°W)",
    y = "Latitude (°N)",
    fill = "HDBSCAN cluster"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_drift_display_no_noise)

ggsave(
  file.path(
    drift_map_plot_dir,
    paste0("drift_pie_map_NO_noise_GROUPED_COORDS_radius0.75_v3_", mapping_result_name, ".png")
  ),
  p_drift_display_no_noise,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

cat("\nPASS: Grouped-coordinate drift pie maps v3 generated.\n")

```

## Save Drift and Cluster Percent Summary Tables

```{r save_drift_cluster_percent_summary_tables}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Drift total composition: percent of all sampled clicks by drift
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_total_click_percent_summary <- mapping_hdbscan_with_locations %>%
  count(
    DriftID_clean,
    DriftName,
    name = "n_clicks_in_drift"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    total_sampled_clicks = sum(n_clicks_in_drift),
    percent_of_all_sampled_clicks = 100 * n_clicks_in_drift / total_sampled_clicks
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_clicks_in_drift))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Cluster total composition: percent of all sampled clicks by cluster
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cluster_total_click_percent_summary <- mapping_hdbscan_with_locations %>%
  count(
    HDBSCAN_cluster,
    name = "n_clicks_in_cluster"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    total_sampled_clicks = sum(n_clicks_in_cluster),
    percent_of_all_sampled_clicks = 100 * n_clicks_in_cluster / total_sampled_clicks,
    cluster_type = if_else(
      HDBSCAN_cluster == "0",
      "unassigned_low_density",
      "assigned_cluster"
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(as.numeric(as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster)))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Drift-by-cluster composition
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_cluster_percent_summary <- mapping_hdbscan_with_locations %>%
  count(
    DriftID_clean,
    DriftName,
    HDBSCAN_cluster,
    name = "n_clicks"
  ) %>%
  group_by(DriftID_clean, DriftName) %>%
  mutate(
    n_clicks_in_drift = sum(n_clicks),
    percent_within_drift = 100 * n_clicks / n_clicks_in_drift
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    total_sampled_clicks = sum(n_clicks),
    percent_of_all_sampled_clicks = 100 * n_clicks / total_sampled_clicks,
    cluster_type = if_else(
      HDBSCAN_cluster == "0",
      "unassigned_low_density",
      "assigned_cluster"
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(
    DriftID_clean,
    as.numeric(as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster))
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save clearly named files
# ------------------------------------------------------------

write.csv(
  drift_total_click_percent_summary,
  file.path(
    drift_map_table_dir,
    paste0("CLEAR_SUMMARY_percent_of_clicks_by_drift_", mapping_result_name, ".csv")
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  cluster_total_click_percent_summary,
  file.path(
    drift_map_table_dir,
    paste0("CLEAR_SUMMARY_percent_of_clicks_by_cluster_TOTAL_", mapping_result_name, ".csv")
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  drift_cluster_percent_summary,
  file.path(
    drift_map_table_dir,
    paste0("CLEAR_SUMMARY_percent_of_clicks_by_drift_AND_cluster_", mapping_result_name, ".csv")
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("Saved clear summary tables:\n\n")

cat(file.path(
  drift_map_table_dir,
  paste0("CLEAR_SUMMARY_percent_of_clicks_by_drift_", mapping_result_name, ".csv")
), "\n")

cat(file.path(
  drift_map_table_dir,
  paste0("CLEAR_SUMMARY_percent_of_clicks_by_cluster_TOTAL_", mapping_result_name, ".csv")
), "\n")

cat(file.path(
  drift_map_table_dir,
  paste0("CLEAR_SUMMARY_percent_of_clicks_by_drift_AND_cluster_", mapping_result_name, ".csv")
), "\n")

cat("\nDrift totals preview:\n")
print(drift_total_click_percent_summary, n = Inf)

cat("\nCluster totals preview:\n")
print(cluster_total_click_percent_summary, n = Inf)

cat("\nPASS: Clear drift/cluster percent summary files saved.\n")

```

## ICI boxplot only: 18PC + 1x scaled logICI; minPts = 50

```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

analysis_name <- "18PC_scaledICI_1"
output_minPts <- 50

result_name <- paste0(analysis_name, "_minPts", output_minPts)

hdbscan_df <- hdbscan_results_list[[result_name]]

if (is.null(hdbscan_df)) {
  stop("Could not find result in hdbscan_results_list: ", result_name)
}

hdbscan_df <- hdbscan_df %>%
  mutate(
    HDBSCAN_cluster = factor(as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster)),
    RowID = as.integer(RowID)
  )

observed_clusters <- sort(as.numeric(as.character(unique(hdbscan_df$HDBSCAN_cluster))))
observed_clusters <- as.character(observed_clusters)

hdbscan_df <- hdbscan_df %>%
  mutate(
    HDBSCAN_cluster = factor(
      as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster),
      levels = observed_clusters
    )
  )

rainbow_cluster_colors <- c(
  "1" = "#E41A1C",
  "2" = "#FF7F00",
  "3" = "#FFD92F",
  "4" = "#4DAF4A",
  "5" = "#00BFC4",
  "6" = "#377EB8",
  "7" = "#984EA3",
  "8" = "#F781BF",
  "9" = "#A65628",
  "10" = "#999999",
  "11" = "#66C2A5",
  "12" = "#FC8D62",
  "13" = "#8DA0CB",
  "14" = "#E78AC3",
  "15" = "#A6D854"
)

cluster_colors_current <- rainbow_cluster_colors[observed_clusters[observed_clusters != "0"]]

hdbscan_no_noise <- hdbscan_df %>%
  filter(HDBSCAN_cluster != "0") %>%
  droplevels()

analysis_plot_dir <- analysis_output_dirs[[analysis_name]]$plots

p_ici_no_noise <- ggplot(
  hdbscan_no_noise,
  aes(
    x = HDBSCAN_cluster,
    y = ICI_to_next_s,
    fill = HDBSCAN_cluster
  )
) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.25) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cluster_colors_current, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "ICI Distribution by HDBSCAN Cluster",
    subtitle = "18PC + 1x scaled logICI; minPts = 50; noise excluded",
    x = "HDBSCAN cluster",
    y = "ICI to next click (seconds, log scale)"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

print(p_ici_no_noise)

ggsave(
  file.path(
    analysis_plot_dir,
    "FULL_ici_boxplot_no_noise_18PC_plus_1x_scaled_logICI_minPts50.png"
  ),
  p_ici_no_noise,
  width = 9,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

```

## Stacked bar charts of event-level cluster proportions by longitude
## 18PC + 1x scaled ICI; minPts = 50

```{r stacked_event_cluster_barplots_18pc_1x_scaled_ici}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Safety checks
# ------------------------------------------------------------

if (!exists("mapping_hdbscan_with_locations")) {
  stop("mapping_hdbscan_with_locations does not exist. Run the mapping coordinate-join chunk first.")
}

if (!exists("event_map_plot_dir")) {
  event_map_plot_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "18PC_scaledICI_1", "mapping_outputs", "by_event", "plots")
  dir.create(event_map_plot_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
}

if (!exists("event_map_table_dir")) {
  event_map_table_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "18PC_scaledICI_1", "mapping_outputs", "by_event", "tables")
  dir.create(event_map_table_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Consistent colors
# ------------------------------------------------------------

event_clusters_all <- sort(
  unique(as.character(mapping_hdbscan_with_locations$HDBSCAN_cluster))
)

cluster_colors_current <- make_cluster_colors(event_clusters_all)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Build event-level cluster composition WITH noise
# ------------------------------------------------------------

event_cluster_counts_with_noise <- mapping_hdbscan_with_locations %>%
  mutate(
    HDBSCAN_cluster = as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster)
  ) %>%
  count(
    EventID_clean,
    DriftID_clean,
    DriftName,
    Latitude,
    Longitude,
    HDBSCAN_cluster,
    name = "n_clicks"
  ) %>%
  group_by(EventID_clean) %>%
  mutate(
    total_clicks_event = sum(n_clicks),
    proportion = n_clicks / total_clicks_event,
    percent = 100 * proportion
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(Longitude, EventID_clean, as.numeric(HDBSCAN_cluster))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Build event-level cluster composition WITHOUT noise
# ------------------------------------------------------------

event_cluster_counts_no_noise <- mapping_hdbscan_with_locations %>%
  mutate(
    HDBSCAN_cluster = as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster)
  ) %>%
  filter(HDBSCAN_cluster != "0") %>%
  count(
    EventID_clean,
    DriftID_clean,
    DriftName,
    Latitude,
    Longitude,
    HDBSCAN_cluster,
    name = "n_clicks"
  ) %>%
  group_by(EventID_clean) %>%
  mutate(
    total_clicks_event_nonnoise = sum(n_clicks),
    proportion = n_clicks / total_clicks_event_nonnoise,
    percent = 100 * proportion
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(Longitude, EventID_clean, as.numeric(HDBSCAN_cluster))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save composition files
# ------------------------------------------------------------

write.csv(
  event_cluster_counts_with_noise,
  file.path(
    event_map_table_dir,
    "18PC_1x_scaled_ICI_event_cluster_composition_WITH_noise_minPts50.csv"
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  event_cluster_counts_no_noise,
  file.path(
    event_map_table_dir,
    "18PC_1x_scaled_ICI_event_cluster_composition_NO_noise_minPts50.csv"
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper function for stacked barplots
# ------------------------------------------------------------

make_event_stacked_barplot <- function(bar_data, include_noise = TRUE, output_name) {
  
  plot_data <- bar_data %>%
    mutate(
      Event_label = paste0(EventID_clean, "\n", round(abs(Longitude), 1), "°W")
    ) %>%
    arrange(Longitude, EventID_clean) %>%
    mutate(
      Event_label = factor(Event_label, levels = unique(Event_label)),
      
      # Reversed levels flip the stacked-bar order.
      # Higher-numbered clusters appear on top.
      HDBSCAN_cluster = factor(
        HDBSCAN_cluster,
        levels = rev(as.character(sort(as.numeric(unique(HDBSCAN_cluster)))))
      )
    )
  
  observed_clusters <- levels(plot_data$HDBSCAN_cluster)
  plot_colors <- cluster_colors_current[observed_clusters]
  
  p <- ggplot(
    plot_data,
    aes(
      x = Event_label,
      y = proportion,
      fill = HDBSCAN_cluster
    )
  ) +
    geom_col(width = 0.9, color = "black", linewidth = 0.1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = plot_colors, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
      expand = c(0, 0)
    ) +
    labs(
      title = ifelse(
        include_noise,
        "Event-Level HDBSCAN Cluster Proportions: Including Noise",
        "Event-Level HDBSCAN Cluster Proportions: Excluding Noise"
      ),
      subtitle = "18PC + 1x scaled ICI; minPts = 50; events sorted west-to-east by longitude",
      x = "Event / Longitude",
      y = "Clicks per cluster (%)",
      fill = "HDBSCAN cluster"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1, size = 6),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "right"
    )
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(event_map_plot_dir, output_name),
    plot = p,
    width = 14,
    height = 6,
    dpi = 300
  )
  
  return(p)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Generate stacked plots
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_bar_including_noise <- make_event_stacked_barplot(
  bar_data = event_cluster_counts_with_noise,
  include_noise = TRUE,
  output_name = "18PC_1x_scaled_ICI_event_stacked_barplot_WITH_noise_minPts50_reversed_stack.png"
)

p_bar_excluding_noise <- make_event_stacked_barplot(
  bar_data = event_cluster_counts_no_noise,
  include_noise = FALSE,
  output_name = "18PC_1x_scaled_ICI_event_stacked_barplot_NO_noise_minPts50_reversed_stack.png"
)

print(p_bar_including_noise)
print(p_bar_excluding_noise)

cat("Saved event cluster composition tables to:\n")
cat(event_map_table_dir, "\n\n")

cat("Saved stacked event barplots to:\n")
cat(event_map_plot_dir, "\n")

```

## Stacked bar charts of event-level cluster proportions by latitude
## 18PC + 1x scaled ICI; minPts = 50

```{r stacked_event_cluster_barplots_by_latitude_18pc_1x_scaled_ici}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Safety checks
# ------------------------------------------------------------

if (!exists("mapping_hdbscan_with_locations")) {
  stop("mapping_hdbscan_with_locations does not exist. Run the mapping coordinate-join chunk first.")
}

if (!exists("event_map_plot_dir")) {
  event_map_plot_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "18PC_scaledICI_1", "mapping_outputs", "by_event", "plots")
  dir.create(event_map_plot_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
}

if (!exists("event_map_table_dir")) {
  event_map_table_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "18PC_scaledICI_1", "mapping_outputs", "by_event", "tables")
  dir.create(event_map_table_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Consistent colors
# ------------------------------------------------------------

event_clusters_all <- sort(
  unique(as.character(mapping_hdbscan_with_locations$HDBSCAN_cluster))
)

cluster_colors_current <- make_cluster_colors(event_clusters_all)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Build event-level cluster composition WITH noise
# ------------------------------------------------------------

event_cluster_counts_with_noise <- mapping_hdbscan_with_locations %>%
  mutate(
    HDBSCAN_cluster = as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster)
  ) %>%
  count(
    EventID_clean,
    DriftID_clean,
    DriftName,
    Latitude,
    Longitude,
    HDBSCAN_cluster,
    name = "n_clicks"
  ) %>%
  group_by(EventID_clean) %>%
  mutate(
    total_clicks_event = sum(n_clicks),
    proportion = n_clicks / total_clicks_event,
    percent = 100 * proportion
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(Latitude, EventID_clean, as.numeric(HDBSCAN_cluster))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Build event-level cluster composition WITHOUT noise
# ------------------------------------------------------------

event_cluster_counts_no_noise <- mapping_hdbscan_with_locations %>%
  mutate(
    HDBSCAN_cluster = as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster)
  ) %>%
  filter(HDBSCAN_cluster != "0") %>%
  count(
    EventID_clean,
    DriftID_clean,
    DriftName,
    Latitude,
    Longitude,
    HDBSCAN_cluster,
    name = "n_clicks"
  ) %>%
  group_by(EventID_clean) %>%
  mutate(
    total_clicks_event_nonnoise = sum(n_clicks),
    proportion = n_clicks / total_clicks_event_nonnoise,
    percent = 100 * proportion
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(Latitude, EventID_clean, as.numeric(HDBSCAN_cluster))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save composition files
# ------------------------------------------------------------

write.csv(
  event_cluster_counts_with_noise,
  file.path(
    event_map_table_dir,
    "18PC_1x_scaled_ICI_event_cluster_composition_WITH_noise_minPts50_sorted_by_latitude.csv"
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  event_cluster_counts_no_noise,
  file.path(
    event_map_table_dir,
    "18PC_1x_scaled_ICI_event_cluster_composition_NO_noise_minPts50_sorted_by_latitude.csv"
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper function for stacked barplots
# ------------------------------------------------------------

make_event_stacked_barplot <- function(bar_data, include_noise = TRUE, output_name) {
  
  plot_data <- bar_data %>%
    mutate(
      Event_label = paste0(EventID_clean, "\n", round(Latitude, 1), "°N")
    ) %>%
    arrange(Latitude, EventID_clean) %>%
    mutate(
      Event_label = factor(Event_label, levels = unique(Event_label)),
      
      # Reversed levels flip the stacked-bar order.
      # Higher-numbered clusters appear on top.
      HDBSCAN_cluster = factor(
        HDBSCAN_cluster,
        levels = rev(as.character(sort(as.numeric(unique(HDBSCAN_cluster)))))
      )
    )
  
  observed_clusters <- levels(plot_data$HDBSCAN_cluster)
  plot_colors <- cluster_colors_current[observed_clusters]
  
  p <- ggplot(
    plot_data,
    aes(
      x = Event_label,
      y = proportion,
      fill = HDBSCAN_cluster
    )
  ) +
    geom_col(width = 0.9, color = "black", linewidth = 0.1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = plot_colors, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
      expand = c(0, 0)
    ) +
    labs(
      title = ifelse(
        include_noise,
        "Event-Level HDBSCAN Cluster Proportions: Including Noise",
        "Event-Level HDBSCAN Cluster Proportions: Excluding Noise"
      ),
      subtitle = "18PC + 1x scaled ICI; minPts = 50; events sorted south-to-north by latitude",
      x = "Event / Latitude",
      y = "Clicks per cluster (%)",
      fill = "HDBSCAN cluster"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1, size = 6),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "right"
    )
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(event_map_plot_dir, output_name),
    plot = p,
    width = 14,
    height = 6,
    dpi = 300
  )
  
  return(p)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Generate stacked plots
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_bar_including_noise_by_latitude <- make_event_stacked_barplot(
  bar_data = event_cluster_counts_with_noise,
  include_noise = TRUE,
  output_name = "18PC_1x_scaled_ICI_event_stacked_barplot_WITH_noise_minPts50_sorted_by_latitude.png"
)

p_bar_excluding_noise_by_latitude <- make_event_stacked_barplot(
  bar_data = event_cluster_counts_no_noise,
  include_noise = FALSE,
  output_name = "18PC_1x_scaled_ICI_event_stacked_barplot_NO_noise_minPts50_sorted_by_latitude.png"
)

print(p_bar_including_noise_by_latitude)
print(p_bar_excluding_noise_by_latitude)

cat("Saved event cluster composition tables to:\n")
cat(event_map_table_dir, "\n\n")

cat("Saved stacked event barplots to:\n")
cat(event_map_plot_dir, "\n")

```

## Pick Peaks from Saved Primary Cluster 9 Mean Spectrum

```{r pickpeaks_cluster_9_saved_primary}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Load packages
# ------------------------------------------------------------

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(pracma)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Load the ORIGINAL saved primary spectra table
# ------------------------------------------------------------

primary_cluster_spectra_summary <- read_csv(
  "E:/Analysis/PCA_ICI_UMAP_HDBSCAN/18PC/18PC_scaledICI_1/tables/clean_cluster_mean_spectra_18PC_scaledICI_1_minPts50.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(
    HDBSCAN_cluster = as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster)
  )

cat("Clusters found in saved primary spectra table:\n")
print(sort(unique(primary_cluster_spectra_summary$HDBSCAN_cluster)))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Pull cluster 9
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cluster_9_spectrum <- primary_cluster_spectra_summary %>%
  filter(HDBSCAN_cluster == "9") %>%
  arrange(Frequency_kHz)

if (nrow(cluster_9_spectrum) == 0) {
  stop("Cluster 9 was not found in the saved primary spectra table.")
}

cat("\nRows in cluster 9 spectrum:\n")
print(nrow(cluster_9_spectrum))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Pick peaks from cluster 9 mean spectrum
# ------------------------------------------------------------

peak_matrix <- pracma::findpeaks(
  cluster_9_spectrum$mean_minmax_spectrum,
  nups = 2,
  ndowns = 2,
  minpeakdistance = 3,
  minpeakheight = 0.15
)

if (is.null(peak_matrix)) {
  stop("No peaks detected. Try lowering minpeakheight or minpeakdistance.")
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Build peak table
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cluster_9_peaks <- data.frame(
  peak_height = peak_matrix[, 1],
  peak_index = peak_matrix[, 2],
  peak_start_index = peak_matrix[, 3],
  peak_end_index = peak_matrix[, 4]
) %>%
  mutate(
    Frequency_kHz = cluster_9_spectrum$Frequency_kHz[peak_index]
  ) %>%
  arrange(Frequency_kHz)

cat("\nDetected peaks:\n")
print(cluster_9_peaks)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save peak table
# ------------------------------------------------------------

write.csv(
  cluster_9_peaks,
  file = "E:/Analysis/PCA_ICI_UMAP_HDBSCAN/18PC/18PC_scaledICI_1/tables/cluster_9_pickpeaks_mean_spectrum.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Plot cluster 9 spectrum with peaks
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_cluster_9_pickpeaks <- ggplot(
  cluster_9_spectrum,
  aes(
    x = Frequency_kHz,
    y = mean_minmax_spectrum
  )
) +
  geom_line(
    linewidth = 1.3,
    color = "#A65628"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = cluster_9_peaks,
    aes(
      x = Frequency_kHz,
      y = peak_height
    ),
    size = 3,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = cluster_9_peaks,
    aes(
      x = Frequency_kHz,
      y = peak_height,
      label = paste0(round(Frequency_kHz, 1), " kHz")
    ),
    vjust = -0.9,
    size = 3.8
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = c(19, 50),
    ylim = c(0, 1.08)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Picked Peaks from Cluster 9 Mean Spectrum",
    subtitle = "18PC + 1x scaled logICI; minPts = 50",
    x = "Frequency (kHz)",
    y = "Mean min-max normalized amplitude"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)

print(p_cluster_9_pickpeaks)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save peak plot
# ------------------------------------------------------------

ggsave(
  filename = "E:/Analysis/PCA_ICI_UMAP_HDBSCAN/18PC/18PC_scaledICI_1/plots/cluster_9_pickpeaks_mean_spectrum.png",
  plot = p_cluster_9_pickpeaks,
  width = 9,
  height = 5.5,
  dpi = 300
)

cat("\nSaved:\n")
cat("- cluster_9_pickpeaks_mean_spectrum.csv\n")
cat("- cluster_9_pickpeaks_mean_spectrum.png\n")

```

## Pick Peaks and Notches for Every Cluster Mean Spectrum

```{r pickpeaks_notches_all_clusters_saved_primary}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(pracma)
library(purrr)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Input / output paths
# ------------------------------------------------------------

primary_spectra_file <- "E:/Analysis/PCA_ICI_UMAP_HDBSCAN/18PC/18PC_scaledICI_1/tables/clean_cluster_mean_spectra_18PC_scaledICI_1_minPts50.csv"

feature_table_out <- "E:/Analysis/PCA_ICI_UMAP_HDBSCAN/18PC/18PC_scaledICI_1/tables/all_clusters_pickpeaks_and_notches_mean_spectra.csv"

feature_plot_dir <- "E:/Analysis/PCA_ICI_UMAP_HDBSCAN/18PC/18PC_scaledICI_1/plots/peak_notch_picking_by_cluster"

dir.create(
  feature_plot_dir,
  recursive = TRUE,
  showWarnings = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Cluster colors from earlier script
# Noise cluster 0 = grey80
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cluster_colors_for_features <- c(
  "0" = "grey60",
  "1" = "#E41A1C",  # red
  "2" = "#FF7F00",  # orange
  "3" = "#FFD92F",  # yellow
  "4" = "#4DAF4A",  # green
  "5" = "#00BFC4",  # cyan
  "6" = "#377EB8",  # blue
  "7" = "#984EA3",  # purple
  "8" = "#F781BF",  # pink
  "9" = "#A65628",  # brown
  "10" = "#999999",
  "11" = "#66C2A5",
  "12" = "#FC8D62"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Load saved primary spectra table
# ------------------------------------------------------------

primary_cluster_spectra_summary <- read_csv(
  primary_spectra_file,
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(
    HDBSCAN_cluster = as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster)
  )

available_clusters <- sort(
  as.numeric(unique(primary_cluster_spectra_summary$HDBSCAN_cluster))
)

available_clusters <- as.character(available_clusters)

cat("Clusters found:\n")
print(available_clusters)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper function: pick peaks and notches for one cluster
# ------------------------------------------------------------

pick_features_one_cluster <- function(cluster_id) {
  
  one_spectrum <- primary_cluster_spectra_summary %>%
    filter(HDBSCAN_cluster == cluster_id) %>%
    arrange(Frequency_kHz)
  
  if (nrow(one_spectrum) == 0) {
    warning("Skipping missing cluster: ", cluster_id)
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # --------------------------
  # Peaks
  # --------------------------
  
  peak_matrix <- pracma::findpeaks(
    one_spectrum$mean_minmax_spectrum,
    nups = 2,
    ndowns = 2,
    minpeakdistance = 3,
    minpeakheight = 0.15
  )
  
  if (is.null(peak_matrix)) {
    
    peaks_df <- tibble()
    
  } else {
    
    peaks_df <- tibble(
      HDBSCAN_cluster = cluster_id,
      feature_type = "peak",
      feature_height = peak_matrix[, 1],
      feature_index = peak_matrix[, 2],
      feature_start_index = peak_matrix[, 3],
      feature_end_index = peak_matrix[, 4],
      Frequency_kHz = one_spectrum$Frequency_kHz[feature_index]
    )
  }
  
  # --------------------------
  # Notches
  # Notches are peaks in the inverted spectrum.
  # --------------------------
  
  notch_matrix <- pracma::findpeaks(
    -one_spectrum$mean_minmax_spectrum,
    nups = 2,
    ndowns = 2,
    minpeakdistance = 3,
    minpeakheight = -0.85
  )
  
  if (is.null(notch_matrix)) {
    
    notches_df <- tibble()
    
  } else {
    
    notches_df <- tibble(
      HDBSCAN_cluster = cluster_id,
      feature_type = "notch",
      feature_height = one_spectrum$mean_minmax_spectrum[notch_matrix[, 2]],
      feature_index = notch_matrix[, 2],
      feature_start_index = notch_matrix[, 3],
      feature_end_index = notch_matrix[, 4],
      Frequency_kHz = one_spectrum$Frequency_kHz[feature_index]
    )
  }
  
  features_df <- bind_rows(
    peaks_df,
    notches_df
  ) %>%
    arrange(Frequency_kHz, feature_type)
  
  return(features_df)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Run peak/notch picking for all clusters
# ------------------------------------------------------------

all_cluster_features <- map_dfr(
  available_clusters,
  pick_features_one_cluster
) %>%
  mutate(
    HDBSCAN_cluster = as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster),
    feature_type = factor(feature_type, levels = c("peak", "notch"))
  ) %>%
  arrange(
    as.numeric(HDBSCAN_cluster),
    Frequency_kHz,
    feature_type
  )

cat("\nDetected peak/notch features:\n")
print(all_cluster_features, n = Inf)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save combined feature table
# ------------------------------------------------------------

write.csv(
  all_cluster_features,
  file = feature_table_out,
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Plot and save one figure per cluster
# ------------------------------------------------------------

for (cluster_id in available_clusters) {
  
  one_spectrum <- primary_cluster_spectra_summary %>%
    filter(HDBSCAN_cluster == cluster_id) %>%
    arrange(Frequency_kHz)
  
  one_features <- all_cluster_features %>%
    filter(HDBSCAN_cluster == cluster_id)
  
  cluster_line_color <- cluster_colors_for_features[[cluster_id]]
  
  if (is.null(cluster_line_color) || is.na(cluster_line_color)) {
    cluster_line_color <- "black"
  }
  
  cluster_label <- ifelse(
    cluster_id == "0",
    "Noise / unassigned cluster 0",
    paste0("Cluster ", cluster_id)
  )
  
  p_one_cluster <- ggplot(
    one_spectrum,
    aes(
      x = Frequency_kHz,
      y = mean_minmax_spectrum
    )
  ) +
    geom_line(
      linewidth = 1.35,
      color = cluster_line_color
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = one_features,
      aes(
        x = Frequency_kHz,
        y = feature_height,
        shape = feature_type
      ),
      size = 3.2,
      color = "black"
    ) +
    geom_text(
      data = one_features,
      aes(
        x = Frequency_kHz,
        y = feature_height,
        label = paste0(round(Frequency_kHz, 1), " kHz")
      ),
      vjust = ifelse(one_features$feature_type == "peak", -0.9, 1.5),
      size = 3.4
    ) +
    scale_shape_manual(
      values = c(
        "peak" = 17,
        "notch" = 25
      ),
      drop = FALSE
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(
      xlim = c(19, 50),
      ylim = c(0, 1.08)
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("Picked Peaks and Notches: ", cluster_label),
      subtitle = "18PC + 1x scaled logICI; minPts = 50",
      x = "Frequency (kHz)",
      y = "Mean min-max normalized amplitude",
      shape = "Feature"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
    )
  
  print(p_one_cluster)
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(
      feature_plot_dir,
      paste0("cluster_", cluster_id, "_picked_peaks_and_notches.png")
    ),
    plot = p_one_cluster,
    width = 10,
    height = 5.8,
    dpi = 300
  )
}

cat("\nSaved combined peak/notch table to:\n")
cat(feature_table_out, "\n\n")

cat("Saved per-cluster plots to:\n")
cat(feature_plot_dir, "\n")

```
